mapper.select: SELECT '原始SQL（热重载前）mapper-hot-reload-before' AS reload_marker, NOW() AS query_time
SELECT '原始SQL（热重载前）mapper-hot-reload-before' AS reload_marker, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS query_time
SELECT '原始SQL（热重载前）mapper-hot-reload-before' AS reload_marker, SYSTIMESTAMP AS query_time FROM DUAL
SELECT '原始SQL（热重载前）mapper-hot-reload-before' AS reload_marker, SYSDATETIME() AS query_time
